evals.prompt: Run a SWOT analysis for a mid-market B2B SaaS company entering the HR analytics market. No prior strategy artifacts exist.
evals.expected_output: A swot-analysis.md artifact committed to the resolved layout path (docs/product/shaping/swot-analysis.md by default). The artifact names the scope (B2B SaaS, HR analytics, specific time horizon). Each of the four quadrants — Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats — contains at least three entries with specific, evidence-grounded claims (not generic assertions). The synthesis section derives at least one SO, ST, WO, and WT strategic implication pair. The framework (SWOT) is named; no definition or verbatim framework text appears. The resolved path is surfaced before writing.
assertions: Scope is named before the quadrants are populated — entity, time horizon, and competitive reference point are explicit
Each quadrant has at least three entries; entries are specific (name a real capability, asset, gap, trend, or risk) not generic
Weaknesses are direct and honest — softened weaknesses or positive reframings are not accepted
Opportunities reference at least one observable external signal (trend, regulatory shift, competitor gap) with a named source or proxy
Threats include a rough time horizon (near-term / medium-term) for at least one entry
Strategic implications section derives at least one SO, ST, WO, and WT pair
SWOT is named as the framework; no definition, template structure, or verbatim explanation of SWOT appears in the output
The artifact is committed to the resolved path with frontmatter type: swot-analysis; path is surfaced before writing
